/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MusicLibrary.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libMusicLibrary.so -o libMusicLibrary.so CMakeFiles/MusicLibrary.dir/src/AudioContent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MusicLibrary.dir/src/MusicDisk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MusicLibrary.dir/src/InstrumentalTrack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MusicLibrary.dir/src/Song.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MusicLibrary.dir/src/MusicalComposition.cpp.o
